description: Move the points of edges onto an external geometric set. The points to be moved are defined by the < range >. Movement of each point is done along the beam-line defined by keyword until it intersects the external geometric set. The < novalidate > option skips validation of all blocks moved as part of the drape operation.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Move the points of edges onto an external geometric set. The points to be moved are defined by the <range>. Movement of each point is done along the beam-line defined by keyword until it intersects the external geometric set. The <novalidate> option skips validation of all blocks moved as part of the drape operation.

keywords.name: inwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from each point to the focus point v.

keywords.name: outwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from the focus point v to each point.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Set the beam-line as a constant direction vector v.

keywords.name: inwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from each point to the focus point v .

keywords.name: outwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from the focus point v to each point.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Set the beam-line as a constant direction vector v .
